mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seckill_activity WHERE DATE(start_time) = #{date} AND status != 3
SELECT * FROM seckill_activity WHERE DATE(start_time) = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND status != 3 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM seckill_activity WHERE start_time > NOW() AND status != 3 ORDER BY start_time ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_activity SET activity_name = #{activityName}, background_image = #{backgroundImage}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seckill_activity ORDER BY create_time DESC
